title: lepisorus triglossus
intro: Lepisorus triglossus, also known as the three-toothed leather fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lepisorus triglossus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lepisorus triglossus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
